personalInfo.name: Murillo Frazão Cunha
personalInfo.title: Full-Stack Developer
bio: I am a Backend Developer with experience in building scalable applications, high-performance systems, and Linux infrastructure. I primarily work with Java, Kotlin, and Node.js, developing modern solutions focused on performance, automation, and scalability.

I have experience in creating robust APIs, distributed systems architecture, and infrastructure management, leveraging technologies such as Docker, PostgreSQL, Redis, and MongoDB to build efficient and resilient applications.

I also work on developing infrastructure and container management panels, including daemons responsible for communication and process execution on Linux servers, applying concepts of monitoring, automation, and real-time communication.
I have a strong interest in software architecture, performance optimization, and developing my own tools aimed at backend application productivity and organization.

I hold a technical degree in Electronics from SENAI and am currently pursuing a Bachelor's degree in Computer Science at FSA, combining hardware and software knowledge to build scalable, modern, and efficient solutions.

resume.summary: Full-Stack Developer focused on distributed environments, scalable systems, and Linux infrastructure. Solid practical experience with Java, Node.js, and Go, combining the creation of robust backend and automation tools with the development of modern interfaces.

timeline.title: Timeline
timeline.description: Chronological tracking of my technical evolution. From developing plugins at age 12 to the architecture of distributed systems and modern frameworks.

skills.title: Skills & Technologies
skills.description: Technologies, tools, and areas in which I have practical experience in application development, infrastructure, and backend systems.

experienceData.description: Responsible for the architecture and development of Vatts.js, a high-performance full-stack framework focused on runtime optimization, HTTP/3, and integration with Go-based services for secure infrastructure and communication.

Development of a Docker container management platform focused on Linux environment automation and game hosting, including the architecture of the execution daemon and process communication, as well as the administrative panel for provisioning, monitoring, and resource management.

Worked on high-performance backends using Java and Kotlin, focusing on scalability, optimization, and high-concurrency systems. Experience with MySQL, Redis, and Linux infrastructure architecture for high-demand environments.

Development of an intelligent passenger monitoring system for public transit as a final course project, utilizing Arduino Mega, ultrasonic sensors, and an ESP8266 for data detection and Wi-Fi transmission. Includes a React web interface for real-time monitoring and visualization of the collected data.

educationData.description: Focus on computer science fundamentals, systems architecture, backend, distributed systems, and framework development.
Study of electronics, automation, digital logic, networking, and practical integration between hardware and software.

certificationsData.description: Concepts of Traditional and Generative AI, impacts on research, productivity, and ethical guidelines.
Analysis of Web history and exploration of emerging technologies applied to Web 3.0.
Enabling technologies: Big Data, IoT, Cloud Computing, Artificial Intelligence, and Digital Security.
Environmental, social, and corporate governance principles focused on business sustainability.
Structuring own businesses, evaluating technical feasibility, market, and legal aspects.
Evolution of mobile networks, basic infrastructure, and advanced applications of 5G technology.
Circular production models, smart consumption, and transition fields integrating Industry 4.0.
Prevention of occupational risks, PPE/EPC guidelines, CIPA regulations, and risk mapping.
Digital privacy under LGPD, data subjects' rights, governance, and legal compliance.

projects.title: Vatts.js - Framework
projects.description: A modern, full-stack web framework for Node.js, built with first-class native support for React and Vue. The project introduces out-of-the-box native HTTP/3 support using an HTTP server written in Go with integrated SSL termination, allowing applications to run directly on the web's latest transport protocol without relying on proxies or external layers. It also features an integrated system for routing, authentication, APIs, and optimized rendering for modern applications.

projects.title: SmartBus - Intelligent Passenger Monitoring
projects.description: Development of an intelligent passenger monitoring system for public transit using embedded hardware and real-time communication. The project consisted of a functional bus prototype with automated detection of people entering and exiting via ultrasonic sensors connected to an Arduino Mega, with data transmission via an ESP8266 using a Wi-Fi network. A web interface in React was also developed for real-time monitoring of passenger counts, metrics visualization, and hardware-software integration.

projects.title: Lunar Panel - Management
projects.description: Development of a modern management panel for servers and Docker containers, inspired by large-scale infrastructure platforms. The frontend was developed in React, while the backend was written in PHP, offering real-time management of instances, users, resources, and administrative operations with a focus on performance, usability, and automation.

projects.title: Lunar Plume - Daemon
projects.description: Development of Lunar Plume, the daemon responsible for direct communication between the panel and Docker servers. Written in Go, the system manages container creation, resource monitoring, command execution, and real-time operations, leveraging concurrency and efficient communication to ensure high performance, stability, and low latency.

projects.title: Hight MC - Minecraft
projects.description: Acted as one of the leaders in the development and management of Hight, a large-scale multiplayer Minecraft server. I was responsible for the architecture and implementation of several advanced systems in Java and Kotlin, working directly on performance, scalability, and stability to support thousands of concurrent players. I also participated in the integration of distributed services, infrastructure optimization, and the development of solutions connected with Redis, PostgreSQL, and MySQL.

projects.title: Hight - Forum
projects.description: Full development of the official Hight forum utilizing Next.js, React, and TypeScript. The system featured direct integration with the Minecraft server, custom authentication, multi-language support, and a modern interface tailored for community interaction, player engagement, and optimized navigation experience.

projects.title: Hight - Store
projects.description: Development of the official Hight store during the platform's internationalization process. The system was built with a focus on automation, performance, and user experience, featuring direct integration with the server, payments via Stripe and cryptocurrencies, automatic delivery of digital products, and a fully responsive, modern interface.
